title: AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE SEAT OF GOVERNMENT OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN PABLO, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, TO THE SITE IN THE OLD POBLACION COMMONLY KNOWN AS CENTRO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 346 / 55 OG No. 18, 3266 (May 14, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2117, April 05, 1959 ]

AN ACT TRANSFERRING THE SEAT OF GOVERNMENT OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN PABLO, PROVINCE OF ISABELA, TO THE SITE IN THE OLD POBLACION COMMONLY KNOWN AS CENTRO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The seat of government of the Municipality of San Pablo, Province of Isabela, is transferred to the site in the old poblacion commonly known as Centro in the same municipality.

SEC. 2. Republic Act Numbered Eleven hundred seventy- seven is hereby repealed.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 5, 1959.
